description:
You are assisting a technical-writer who has just inherited an unstructured documentation folder.  
Your goal is to create a clean directory hierarchy, move/rename specific files, and keep a **deterministic audit log** of every action you perform.  
Follow the exact specifications below so automated tests can verify your work.

INITIAL SET-UP (already present when the session starts)  
• /home/user/workspace/intro.md  
• /home/user/workspace/api.md  
• /home/user/workspace/style.md  
• /home/user/workspace/guide.txt  

TARGET STRUCTURE (what must exist when you are done)  
/home/user/workspace/docs/               (new)  
├── drafts/                              (new)  
│   ├── api.md  
│   ├── guide.md         (originally guide.txt, renamed)  
│   ├── intro.md  
│   └── style.md          (copied)  
├── published/                           (new)  
│   └── style.md         (copied)  
└── archive/                             (new)  

REQUIREMENTS
1. Create the three nested directories shown above under /home/user/workspace/docs/.  
   (Creating /home/user/workspace/docs itself counts as a directory-creation action.)  

2. Rename /home/user/workspace/guide.txt to guide.md **while** moving it into /home/user/workspace/docs/drafts/.  
   The final path must therefore be /home/user/workspace/docs/drafts/guide.md  

3. Move intro.md and api.md into /home/user/workspace/docs/drafts/ (filenames must stay the same).  

4. Copy (do NOT move) style.md twice:  
   4a. One copy to /home/user/workspace/docs/drafts/style.md  
   4b. A second copy to /home/user/workspace/docs/published/style.md  
   The original /home/user/workspace/style.md must remain untouched in its original location.  

5. Produce an **audit log** named /home/user/workspace/reorg_log.csv with the following exact CSV format:  
   • It must begin with a single header line:  
     timestamp,action,source,target  
   • Use the literal timestamp 2023-01-01 00:00:00 (exactly that value, do NOT use the current date) for every recorded action.  
   • Record one line for each action, in the exact order you perform them.  
     The automated grader will expect **nine** data lines, corresponding to:  
       1) make_dir /home/user/workspace/docs  
       2) make_dir /home/user/workspace/docs/drafts  
       3) make_dir /home/user/workspace/docs/published  
       4) make_dir /home/user/workspace/docs/archive  
       5) rename_move /home/user/workspace/guide.txt /home/user/workspace/docs/drafts/guide.md  
       6) move /home/user/workspace/intro.md /home/user/workspace/docs/drafts/intro.md  
       7) move /home/user/workspace/api.md  /home/user/workspace/docs/drafts/api.md  
       8) copy /home/user/workspace/style.md /home/user/workspace/docs/drafts/style.md  
       9) copy /home/user/workspace/style.md /home/user/workspace/docs/published/style.md  
   • The “action” column values must be exactly: make_dir, rename_move, move, or copy.  
   • Example of a single data line (do NOT repeat this example literally—use the correct paths):  
     2023-01-01 00:00:00,make_dir,/home/user/workspace/docs,/home/user/workspace/docs  

6. Ensure file contents remain unchanged during moves/copies (except for the renamed guide.txt → guide.md).  

7. Do **not** remove any files that are not mentioned above.  

When everything is finished, the grader will check:  
• Existence and exact placement of every directory and file listed in “TARGET STRUCTURE”.  
• That /home/user/workspace/style.md is still present in its original location.  
• That /home/user/workspace/reorg_log.csv exists and matches the precise format and nine data lines described.  

Remember: you are not asked to display the log on screen; just make sure the file exists with the correct content and path.
truth:
Pre-existing files before the task starts:  
/home/user/workspace/intro.md        (any content)  
/home/user/workspace/api.md          (any content)  
/home/user/workspace/style.md        (any content)  
/home/user/workspace/guide.txt       (any content)

Files & directories that must exist after successful completion:

Directories  
/home/user/workspace/docs  
/home/user/workspace/docs/drafts  
/home/user/workspace/docs/published  
/home/user/workspace/docs/archive

Files  
/home/user/workspace/docs/drafts/api.md     (same bytes as original api.md)  
/home/user/workspace/docs/drafts/intro.md   (same bytes as original intro.md)  
/home/user/workspace/docs/drafts/guide.md   (same bytes as original guide.txt)  
/home/user/workspace/docs/drafts/style.md   (same bytes as original style.md)  
/home/user/workspace/docs/published/style.md (same bytes as original style.md)  
/home/user/workspace/style.md               (original file, unchanged)  
/home/user/workspace/reorg_log.csv          (exact content below)

Exact required content of /home/user/workspace/reorg_log.csv:

timestamp,action,source,target
2023-01-01 00:00:00,make_dir,/home/user/workspace/docs,/home/user/workspace/docs
2023-01-01 00:00:00,make_dir,/home/user/workspace/docs/drafts,/home/user/workspace/docs/drafts
2023-01-01 00:00:00,make_dir,/home/user/workspace/docs/published,/home/user/workspace/docs/published
2023-01-01 00:00:00,make_dir,/home/user/workspace/docs/archive,/home/user/workspace/docs/archive
2023-01-01 00:00:00,rename_move,/home/user/workspace/guide.txt,/home/user/workspace/docs/drafts/guide.md
2023-01-01 00:00:00,move,/home/user/workspace/intro.md,/home/user/workspace/docs/drafts/intro.md
2023-01-01 00:00:00,move,/home/user/workspace/api.md,/home/user/workspace/docs/drafts/api.md
2023-01-01 00:00:00,copy,/home/user/workspace/style.md,/home/user/workspace/docs/drafts/style.md
2023-01-01 00:00:00,copy,/home/user/workspace/style.md,/home/user/workspace/docs/published/style.md
